title.en: The Travels of Ibn Battuta, A.D. 1325–1354
title.ar: تحفة النظار في غرائب الأمصار وعجائب الأسفار (الرحلة)

author.en: Ibn Battuta; tr. H. A. R. Gibb

reliability.en: Gibb's annotated translation of the Rihla as dictated to Ibn Juzayy in 1354–55 is the standard scholarly edition. Some itinerary details are reconstructed; long-disputed gaps (notably the Volga–Bulgar leg and parts of the China account) are flagged in commentary. Cross-check contested dates against Hrbek (1962) and Dunn, *The Adventures of Ibn Battuta* (1986).
